zh.lifeSummary: 當Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill於大約1330年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾多爾拉奧時，她的父親Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill31歲，母親Gwladus Verch Gryffydd31歲。她和Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan至少有9個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1380年在法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill于大约1330年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾多爾拉奧时，她的父亲Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill31岁，母亲Gwladus Verch Gryffydd31岁。她和Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan至少有9个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1380年在法国阿奎泰道多卡拉斯享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Pickhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickerill
meanings: English: from Middle English pykerell ‘young pike’ (fromMiddle English pike ‘pike’ (a predatory fish) + the diminutivesuffix -erel), applied as a nickname for a sharp and aggressiveperson, or possibly as a metonymic occupational name for a catcher orseller of these fish.

nameMeanings.name: Mallt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Maud , a common name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill was born about 1330, in Dolgellau, Merionethshire, Wales, her father, Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill, was 31 and her mother, Gwladus Verch Gryffydd, was 31. She had at least 9 sons and 3 daughters with Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. She died in 1380, in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill est née environ 1330, à Dolgellau, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gwladus Verch Gryffydd, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles avec Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill um 1330 in Dolgellau, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill 31 und ihre Mutter Gwladus Verch Gryffydd 31. Sie hatte mit Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill è nata il circa 1330 nel Dolgellau, Merionethshire, Galles, sua padre, Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gwladus Verch Gryffydd, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie con Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. Morì nel 1380, nel Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhillが約1330年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアドルジェラウで生まれた時，父Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhillは31歳，母Gwladus Verch Gryffyddは31歳であった。彼女はMeurig Llwyd Meurig Vychanとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1380年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンカレイスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill(이)가 대략 1330년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 도그로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladus Verch Gryffydd(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 캘레이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Dolgellau, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gwladus Verch Gryffydd, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas com Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill родилась около 1330 г. в местности долгеллау, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hywell ap Dafydd of Pickhill было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gwladus Verch Gryffydd, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери от Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности калеи, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas con Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan. Murió en 1380, en Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
